title: Statue of Alois Jirásek, Prague
summary: The statue of Alois Jirásek (Czech: Pomník Aloise Jiráska) is an outdoor sculpture by Karel Pokorný and Jaroslav Fragner, installed in Prague, Czech Republic.
text: The statue of Alois Jirásek (Czech: Pomník Aloise Jiráska) is an outdoor sculpture by Karel Pokorný and Jaroslav Fragner, installed in Prague, Czech Republic.
